app.name: ClassLite
app.errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
app.errorBoundary.body: We've been notified and our team is looking into it.
app.permissionDenied.title: You don't have access to this section
app.permissionDenied.bodyOwnerAdmin: This section requires an Owner or Admin role. Ask your Center Owner or Admin to grant you access.
app.permissionDenied.bodyOwner: This section is reserved for the Center Owner. Ask your Owner to grant you access.
people.invite.error.roleAssignmentForbid: Only an Owner can assign the Owner role.
people.invite.error.emailTaken: An active invite already exists for this email.
app.notFound.title: Page not found
app.notFound.body: The page you were looking for moved or no longer exists.
auth.login.title: Sign in to ClassLite
auth.register.title: Create your account
auth.register.signInLink: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.register.terms: By creating an account, you agree to ClassLite's Terms and Privacy.
auth.login.signUpLink: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.common.validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.common.validation.fullNameMax: Full name is too long (max 200 characters)
auth.register.error.emailTaken: This email is already registered. Try signing in.
auth.register.error.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
auth.register.error.generic: We couldn't create your account. Please try again.
auth.register.emailDelivery.failedToast: Couldn't send verification email — try Resend on the next screen.
auth.login.error.accountLocked: Account temporarily locked. Try again in {{minutes}} minutes.
auth.login.error.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
auth.login.error.generic: We couldn't sign you in. Please try again.
auth.login.error.oauthGeneric: We couldn't complete sign-in with Google. Please try again.
auth.login.banner.verified: Your email is verified. Sign in to continue.
auth.login.banner.reset: Password reset complete. We signed out your other devices to keep your account safe — sign in here to continue.
auth.login.banner.invited: Welcome — you've joined your center. Sign in to continue.
auth.invite.title: You've been invited
auth.invite.body: Continue with Google or set a password to accept your invitation.
auth.invite.backToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.invite.error.notFound.heading: Invitation no longer valid
auth.invite.error.notFound.body: This invite link is broken or has been revoked. Ask the person who invited you to send a new one.
auth.invite.error.expired.heading: Invitation expired
auth.invite.error.expired.body: Your invitation to {{centerName}} has expired. Ask {{inviterEmail}} to send a new one.
auth.invite.error.alreadyAccepted.body: Sign in to continue to your center.
auth.invite.error.emailMismatch.heading: Wrong account
auth.invite.error.emailMismatch.body: This invite was sent to a different email address. Sign in with the account the invite was sent to, or ask the inviter for a new link.
auth.invite.error.passwordNotAllowed.bod: Continue with Google to accept this invite — the password field doesn't apply.
auth.invite.error.invalidToken.heading: Invite link malformed
auth.invite.error.invalidToken.body: This link can't be read — check your email for the correct one, or ask the inviter to send a new one.
auth.invite.error.emailAlreadyRegistered: An account for this email already exists. Sign in and the invite will be applied to your account.
auth.invite.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.verify.title: Check your email
auth.verify.bodyPrefix: We sent a verification link to
auth.verify.bodySuffix: Click the link to finish signing in.
auth.verify.resendSentToast: If your email is registered, a new verification link is on its way.
auth.verify.spamHint: Check your spam folder if you don't see it within a minute.
auth.verify.googleFallbackCta: Sign in with Google using {{email}} — we'll link them automatically.
auth.verify.timeoutBody: We've paused automatic checking. Tap the button below when you've clicked the link.
auth.verify.expiredBody: Links expire after 24 hours. Request a new one and we'll send it right away.
auth.verify.invalidBody: This link can't be used. Try the link in your most recent email, or sign in to request a new one.
auth.verify.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.verify.error.rateLimited: Please wait {{seconds}}s before requesting another email.
auth.forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
auth.forgotPassword.body: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.forgotPassword.sentBody: We've sent a reset link to {{email}} if that address is on file. The link expires in 1 hour.
auth.forgotPassword.spamHint: Check your spam folder if you don't see it within a minute.
auth.forgotPassword.wrongEmail: Wrong email? Try a different address.
auth.forgotPassword.error.rateLimited: Please wait {{seconds}}s before requesting another link.
auth.forgotPassword.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.resetPassword.title: Set a new password
auth.resetPassword.body: Choose a strong password you don't use anywhere else. All other devices will be signed out when you save.
auth.resetPassword.expiredBody: Reset links expire after 1 hour. Request a new one to continue.
auth.resetPassword.consumedBody: This reset link was already used. Sign in with your new password, or request a new link if needed.
auth.resetPassword.consumedForgotCta: Need to reset again? Request a new link.
auth.resetPassword.invalidBody: This link can't be used — it may be from an older email. Try the link in your most recent email, or request a new one.
auth.resetPassword.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.login.lockout.heading: Try again later
auth.login.lockout.body_one: Too many sign-in attempts. You can try again in {{count}} minute, or reset your password now.
auth.login.lockout.body_other: Too many sign-in attempts. You can try again in {{count}} minutes, or reset your password now.
auth.login.oauthMismatch.heading: Wrong Google account
auth.login.oauthMismatch.body: The Google account you signed in with isn't the one this invite was sent to.
auth.login.oauthMismatch.reopenInviteHin: If you don't have the original invite email, ask the inviter to send a new one.
auth.login.workspaceBlocked.heading: Google didn't allow sign-in
auth.login.workspaceBlocked.bodyUserinfo: Your Google account couldn't complete sign-in. This usually means your Workspace administrator hasn't allowed this app. Try a personal Gmail account or sign up with email.
auth.login.workspaceBlocked.bodyEmailUnv: Your Google account email isn't verified yet. Verify your email at myaccount.google.com, then try signing in again — or use a different account.
auth.login.banner.sessionExpired: We signed you out for security. Sign in to continue where you left off.
auth.login.banner.sessionExpiredDataLoss: Any unsaved changes on the previous page may be lost.

onboarding.persona.title: Which role fits you best?
onboarding.persona.subtitle: Pick the one that describes how you'll spend most of your time.
onboarding.persona.operator.title: Operator
onboarding.persona.operator.description: You run day-to-day operations for a team of teachers — scheduling, payments, communications — and rarely stand in front of a class yourself.
onboarding.persona.founder.title: Founder
onboarding.persona.founder.lede: You build the center. You still teach.
onboarding.persona.founder.description: You started the center, own the plan, and still teach at least one class yourself.
onboarding.persona.solo.title: Solo Teacher
onboarding.persona.solo.lede: It's just you and your students.
onboarding.persona.solo.description: You teach on your own — no admin team, no other instructors. You want the workflow bent around one person.

onboarding.persona.error.emailVerificati: Verify your email address before continuing.
onboarding.persona.error.generic: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.

dashboard.welcomeBack.banner: Welcome back — pick up where you left off.
dashboard.welcomeBack.awaitingNextStep: We'll pick this up when the next step is ready.
dashboard.checklist.subtitle.operator: Invite teachers, tune sessions, and get the AI grading working for you.
dashboard.checklist.subtitle.founder: First class is spun up — a few more touches and you're teaching.
dashboard.checklist.subtitle.solo_teache: Simple workspace, ready when you are — a couple of steps to make it yours.
dashboard.checklist.footer.autosave: Auto-saves · come back any time from Settings → Setup
dashboard.aiSample.title: Grading looks like this.
dashboard.aiSample.essayExcerpt: Some argue that governments should invest heavily in the arts, while others believe that scientific research is more important. In my opinion, both are essential — but scientific research often addresses more urgent needs. Firstly, science drives medical progress that saves lives every day. Secondly…
dashboard.aiSample.feedbackQuote: Strong topic sentence in paragraph 2 — anchors the argument. Try tightening the conclusion (2–3 sentences max).
dashboard.aiSample.disclaimer: Sample essay — this is how a real grade will look once your students hand in work.
dashboard.samplePreview.thresholdBanner: Your center analytics fill in once teachers start grading.
dashboard.samplePreview.disclaimer: This is a preview. Real numbers land as your team teaches, grades, and enrols.
dashboard.yourClasses.heading: Your classes
dashboard.yourClasses.ghost: Your first classes at {{centerName}} will show up here.
dashboard.deadLink.notReady: That surface ships with Epic {{epicNum}} — coming soon.

onboarding.template.subtitle: Pick a starter — you can tweak sessions later.
onboarding.template.buildFromScratch.des: Build your own sessions from a blank canvas.

onboarding.spawn.rowMinimum: You need at least one class to continue.
onboarding.spawn.customTemplateNotice: Custom template creation is coming soon
onboarding.spawn.customTemplateNotice.pi: Head back and pick a starter template — you can save it as your own after we ship custom templates.

onboarding.spawn.error.startDateTooFarFu: Start date can't be more than {{years}} years in the future.
onboarding.spawn.error.teacherEmailSelfI: You can't invite yourself. Leave the field empty and we'll assign you as the teacher.

onboarding.solo.subtitle: It's just you teaching this one.
onboarding.done.title: You're all set, {{centerName}}!
onboarding.done.subtitle.operator: Your center is live. Bring your teachers in — the AI grading and session tools are ready when they are.
onboarding.done.subtitle.founder: Your first class is spun up and you're set to teach. The dashboard is your launchpad from here.
onboarding.done.subtitle.solo_teacher: One class, one teacher — you. Jump in and start your first session.

onboarding.done.error.setupIncomplete: We couldn't confirm your setup. This is rare — try refreshing, or continue to your dashboard.
Connect the tools your center already uses. We'll ask before sharing anything with them.
settings.integrations.googleMeet.title: Google Meet
settings.integrations.googleMeet.descrip: Auto-generate a Meet link for every online session in a class.
settings.integrations.googleMeet.connect: Google Meet connected. New online sessions will include Meet links.

Google Meet connection cancelled. Try again whenever you're ready.
settings.integrations.googleMeet.disconn: New online sessions won't include Meet links until you reconnect. Existing sessions keep their links.
We couldn't disconnect. Refresh and try again.
